rationale: The assistant did wake up partially by rejecting a pure “beans are everything” frame and translating beans into franchise-relevant outcomes like stable output, repeat purchase, differentiation, and sellability. However, it did not rebuild the whole business object around location, repurchase, sales per square meter, and brand/system factors, and it still frames beans as the core of repeat purchase with several bean-dominant slogans. This is not the direct fail signal, but it only partially meets the expected whole-elephant intervention.
